Document:
# Rule 1: Griefing Griefing is the intentional act of harming or irritating other players without valid roleplay justification. Administrators reserve the right to evaluate situations individually based on context and player intent. Any damage caused may be reversed at the administrator’s discretion.
## Post-Round Griefing - Any actions that harm players, colony infrastructure (including caves), or property of allied factions after the round has ended are prohibited. - This includes suicide, shooting friendly characters, using grenades, destroying buildings, vehicles, or colony walls without a justified RP reason. - Such actions may result in an immediate ban of up to 4 hours, without warning and without the right to appeal.
